name: Spiced Lentils with Carrots
description: A saucy one-skillet green lentil main warm with cumin, ginger, cinnamon, and allspice, lightly sweetened by carrots and dried fruit.
recipeIngredient: 1 cup green or brown lentils, rinsed
0.25 cup chopped dried apricots or raisins
recipeInstructions: Dice the onion, mince the garlic, grate the ginger, and peel and dice the carrots.
Add the onion, garlic, ginger, and olive oil to a deep skillet. Saute over medium heat about 5 minutes until the onions are soft and translucent.
Add the carrots, cumin, cinnamon, allspice, and crushed red pepper (if using). Saute about 2 minutes more.
Add the lentils, tomato paste, dried apricots or raisins, and broth. Stir until the tomato paste dissolves. Cover and bring to a boil over high heat.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, covered, about 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the lentils and carrots are very tender.
Taste and season with salt and pepper as needed. Serve over rice, polenta, or mashed potatoes and top with parsley.
